# Best Prague Guide — Private Tours with Licensed Czech Guides

> Best Prague Guide is a private tour operator in Prague, Czech Republic, run by Uliana Formina — a licensed top-category Czech tour guide with years of experience and thousands of guests served. We offer private walking tours of Prague and day trips across the Czech Republic in English and Russian. All tours are private only: just your group, no strangers.

Credentials: Member of the Czech Guides Association, Union of Tourist Business of the Czech Republic, and the World Federation of Tourist Guide Associations (WFTGA).

Contact: info@bestpragueguide.com | +420 776 306 858 | https://bestpragueguide.com

## Core pages

- [Home](https://bestpragueguide.com/en): Overview of all private tours in Prague and the Czech Republic, led by licensed guide Uliana Formina.
- [About Uliana Formina](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/prague-guide): Biography, credentials, and experience of our lead guide — top-category Czech license, member of international guide associations.
- [All Tours](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours): Complete list of 17 private tours in Prague and day trips across the Czech Republic.
- [Prices](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/prices): Transparent per-group pricing for all tours.
- [Reviews](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/reviews): Guest testimonials from our private tours.
- [Contact](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/contact): Booking inquiries and questions.

## Private walking tours in Prague

- [Charles Bridge and Old Town](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/charles-bridge-old-town): 2-hour private walking tour of Prague's Old Town and Charles Bridge.
- [Prague Castle and Lesser Town](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/prague-castle-lesser-town): Private tour of Prague Castle grounds, St. Vitus Cathedral, and the Lesser Town.
- [All Prague in One Day](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/all-prague-in-one-day): 6-hour comprehensive private tour covering Old Town, Charles Bridge, Prague Castle, and Vyšehrad.
- [Best of Prague Car Tour](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/best-of-prague-car-tour): Combined driving and walking tour with hotel pickup covering Prague's main landmarks.
- [Hidden Prague — Underground and Alchemy](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/hidden-prague-underground-alchemy): Private tour of Prague's medieval underground, the Speculum Alchemiae alchemy museum, and the Church of St. James.

## Day trips from Prague

- [Český Krumlov](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/cesky-krumlov): Full-day private tour to UNESCO-listed Český Krumlov, a medieval town with castle and winding streets.
- [Kutná Hora and the Bone Church](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/kutna-hora): Private tour to Kutná Hora's Sedlec Ossuary and Gothic cathedral.
- [Karlovy Vary](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/karlsbad): Historic spa town with thermal springs and colonnades.
- [Terezín Memorial](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/terezin-memorial): Former WWII ghetto and memorial site, 60 km north of Prague.
- [Karlštejn Castle](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/karlstejn-castle): 14th-century Gothic castle built by Emperor Charles IV, 30 km from Prague.
- [Hluboká Castle](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/hluboka-castle): Neo-Gothic castle in South Bohemia, 145 km from Prague.
- [Český Šternberk](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/cesky-sternberk): Medieval castle owned by the Šternberk family for over 760 years.
- [Kozel Brewery](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/kozel-brewery-tour): Visit the Velkopopovický Kozel brewery with private guide and beer tasting.
- [Pilsner Urquell Brewery](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/pilsner-urquell-brewery): Full-day private tour to Plzeň and the original Pilsner Urquell brewery, birthplace of pilsner lager.
- [Škoda Factory](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/skoda-factory): Tour of the Škoda automobile museum and factory in Mladá Boleslav.

## Specialty experiences

- [Medieval Dinner Show](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/2000-medieval-dinner-prague): Evening medieval tavern experience with dinner and historical performance in Prague's Old Town.
- [Afternoon Medieval Dinner](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/tours/1630-medieval-dinner-prague): Daytime medieval dinner show at U Pavouka tavern.

- [Private Walking Tours](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/private-walking-tour-prague): Overview of all Prague walking tour options with pricing.

- [Sightseeing Tours](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/prague-sightseeing-tour): Comparison of sightseeing tour formats — walking, car, and full-day.
- [Day Trips Hub](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/day-trips-from-prague): All 10 day trips from Prague compared with pricing and recommendations.

## Blog — practical Prague guides

- [Blog Index](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/blog): 265+ articles covering Prague attractions, history, food, day trips, and travel tips.
- [Is a Tour Guide Worth It?](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/blog/is-prague-tour-guide-worth-it): Honest assessment of when a guide adds value and when you can explore alone.
- [Private Tour Costs](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/blog/prague-private-tour-cost): 2026 price guide with comparison of free, group, and private tours.
- [How to Choose a Guide](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/blog/how-to-choose-prague-tour-guide): 7 things to check before booking — licensing, reviews, pricing transparency.
- [FAQ](https://bestpragueguide.com/en/faq): Common questions about private tours, pricing, and booking.
